_notes: Rider profiles for handicap prediction. Update after each race.
_units: weight_kg, height_cm, power in watts, cda in m^2, crr dimensionless

Waterhouse.notes: Sandbagging dog. R2 DNF, R3 win at 278W/3.8wkg, R4 272W/3.7wkg (dead last despite fastest ride time). Power updated to 272W. CdA 0.256 calibrated from fit data.

Heslop.notes: The Diesel. 4 podiums in 4 races. R2 210W, R3 237W, R4 240W/3.0wkg. Power updated to 240W. Fade reduced to 3% — very consistent across laps in R4.

Einoder.notes: Small Bark Big Bite. R2 152W, R3 156W, R4 151W/2.4wkg. Consistent ~152W across 3 races. Fade reduced to 5% — held power well in R4.

Barton.notes: The Fridge. R4 WINNER at 219W/1.6wkg, ride time 38:33 vs predicted 48:22 — model was 10min off. CdA reduced from 0.400 to 0.350 to better match R4 speed data. Power updated to 219W. Vendetta over — now Claude's biggest fan.

Baum.notes: Pissgargling triathlete. Only raced R2 (253W, 3.33wkg). DNS R1, R3, R4. Limited data — 1 race only.

Bone.notes: Big Glands Bone. ZERO race data. DNS all 4 rounds. Self-reported FTP 215W but has never raced. All values are guesses.
